'''Norda Proi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|defense fleet]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], he was stationed onboard the [[Steadfast (carrier)|''Steadfast'']] alongside [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oolas]]. Together, they searched for information from [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial ships]]. This mission was known as [[Operation Flotsam]].<ref name="Before the Storm" />

{{Char-stub}}
